title: Science and Culture Administration
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Science and Culture Administration''' was a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Republic General Ministry|bureaucracy]] in [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. One of its divisions was the [[Republic Astrogation Survey Team]], which scouted the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
*<!-- 2010-04-20 -->''[[The Unknown Regions]]''
